Description: SP created sharing request - initial state
Trigger/Condition: SP calls POST /sharing-requests with valid correlation ID
Notes: Entry point for all sharing requests

Description: User opened the sharing request in UAE PASS
Trigger/Condition: User taps notification or navigates to pending requests

Description: Mandatory documents not available in user's vault
Trigger/Condition: System checks document availability and finds missing docs

Description: User initiated request for missing documents from ICP
Trigger/Condition: User taps Request Missing Documents button

Description: Some documents requested successfully but others failed
Trigger/Condition: ICP returns partial success for document requests
Notes: User may proceed with available docs or retry

Description: All document requests to ICP failed
Trigger/Condition: ICP returns error for all document types requested

Description: Documents do not exist or user not eligible
Trigger/Condition: ICP confirms user cannot get these documents

Description: All mandatory documents already in vault
Trigger/Condition: System confirms all requested docs are available

Description: User viewing consent screen with all requirements met
Trigger/Condition: User reaches consent screen with available documents

Description: User checked consent checkbox
Trigger/Condition: User checks I consent checkbox
Notes: Consent provided but not yet shared

Description: User pressed Share My Documents button
Trigger/Condition: User taps Share My Documents button

Description: PIN entry screen displayed to user
Trigger/Condition: System prompts for PIN authentication

Description: PIN validated successfully
Trigger/Condition: User enters correct PIN within 3 attempts

Description: PIN verification failed after max attempts
Trigger/Condition: User exhausted 3 PIN attempts

Description: Creating verifiable presentation and transmitting to SP
Trigger/Condition: System begins eSeal validation and SP API call

Description: Documents successfully delivered to SP
Trigger/Condition: SP API returns 200 OK and confirms receipt

Description: User explicitly declined to share documents
Trigger/Condition: User taps Decline or Cancel on consent screen

Description: Request expired before user provided consent
Trigger/Condition: TTL reached before user checked consent checkbox

Description: Request expired after consent but before completion
Trigger/Condition: TTL reached after consent but before successful transmission

Description: Backend or technical error during sharing process
Trigger/Condition: eSeal validation failure / SP API error / Network timeout

Description: User left flow without completing
Trigger/Condition: User exits app or does not return after timeout threshold
